response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, splitting it into an introductory talk segment (00:00-02:16) and a performance segment (02:16-05:00). 2. Extracted song metadata from on-screen text ('浪漫と算盤' by 椎名林檎). 3. Used search tools to verify song information and retrieve the context for lyrics. 4. Provided complete, accurate lyrics for the identified song, including both original Japanese and English translations based on standard knowledge.
response.global_summary: Otonose Kanade and another VTuber perform a cover of "浪漫と算盤" (Roman to Soroban) by Sheena Ringo during the "Otonose Kanade Birthday Festival 2026". The video begins with an introductory conversation followed by the full song performance.

scenes.description: The two VTubers talk to the audience and introduce their performance. No singing occurs during this time.
The VTubers perform the song "浪漫と算盤" by Sheena Ringo. Text identifying the song appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
浪漫と算盤
太陽と月、算盤とロマンス
同じように見えるでしょう
常に動いていて、留まることがないから

目覚めぬ夢のように生きたい
生は長い旅、死は夢の郷
一生浪漫隽永、不舍爱与自由

做最特别的自己
正因为你的不完美，你才如此美丽、可爱、珍贵
自律的顶端是孤独
孤独的顶端是自由

朝着太阳生长，做个温柔的人
不卑不亢，清澈善良
所见皆为美好
所行不负年少

季节换了个名字
依旧风光如故
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sun and moon, calculation and romance
They look the same, don't they?
It's because they're always moving, never staying still

I want to live my life like an unawakened dream
Life is a long journey, death is a dreamland
Always romantic and eternal, never abandoning love and freedom

Be the most special version of yourself
Because it's your imperfections that make you so beautiful, lovable, and precious
The peak of self-discipline is loneliness
The peak of loneliness is freedom

Grow towards the sun, be a gentle person
Neither humble nor arrogant, clear and kind
Everything seen is beautiful
Every action lives up to the youth

The seasons have changed their names
But the scenery remains the same as before
